name: docker-scanner
description: Scan container images for vulnerabilities from VS Code. Uses the docker-scanner CLI — Trivy + CISA KEV + OSV.dev + runc advisory + Web UI.

commands.title: Docker Scanner: Scan image for current Dockerfile
Docker Scanner: Check host runc for container escape CVEs

dockerScanner.cliPath.description: Path to the scanner CLI binary. Use 'go run ./cmd/cli' to run from repo source.

dockerScanner.serverPath.description: Path to the scanner-server binary (for Open Web UI command). Use 'go run ./cmd/server' to run from repo source.

dockerScanner.reportsDir.description: Output directory for scan reports (SARIF, Markdown, HTML, CSV, SBOM).

dockerScanner.formats.description: Comma-separated report formats: sarif, markdown, html, csv.

dockerScanner.severity.description: Comma-separated severities to include: CRITICAL,HIGH,MEDIUM,LOW,UNKNOWN. Empty = all.

dockerScanner.failOnSeverity.description: Show a warning if findings at these severities are found (e.g. CRITICAL,HIGH). Empty = never warn on severity.

dockerScanner.checkRuntime.description: Also check the host runc version for known container escape CVEs (CVE-2024-21626, CVE-2025-31133, etc.).

dockerScanner.sbom.description: Generate a CycloneDX SBOM (report.cdx.json) alongside the vulnerability report.

dockerScanner.offline.description: Skip Trivy DB update and OSV.dev enrichment. Use cached data only (air-gapped mode).

dockerScanner.webUIPort.description: Port for the scanner Web UI server (used by the Open Web UI command).
